overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a medieval castle interior with an ornate stone fireplace. A translucent ghostly figure appears and moves near the fireplace while the camera remains mostly stationary, capturing the warm firelight and detailed stone architecture.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a medieval castle interior centered on an ornate stone fireplace with a burning fire. The warm firelight illuminates the carved stone architecture and patterned floor tiles. A translucent ghostly figure appears on the left side, fading in and out of visibility while the camera maintains a steady observation of the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze on a medieval castle interior as a spectral presence emerges within the warm glow of a hearth. It begins with a focused view of an ornate stone fireplace, where the flickering flames cast dancing light across carved architecture and patterned floor tiles. As the camera holds its position, a translucent ghostly figure gradually fades into existence on the left side of the frame. The scene then lingers on the interplay between the solid stone surroundings and the shimmering, unstable form of the spirit as it pulses in and out of visibility.
